questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Transaction Control?
options: Inefficient scaling of BEGIN, COMMIT, ROLLBACK statements scopes.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of BEGIN, COMMIT, ROLLBACK statements scopes.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how BEGIN, COMMIT, ROLLBACK statements scopes scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
